customCommands.name: add folder
customCommands.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "param([string]$folderName); if([string]::IsNullOrEmpty($folderName)) { Write-Host 'Error: 폴더 이름을 입력해주세요'; exit 1 } else { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $folderName -Force | Out-Null; Write-Host \"✓ 폴더 '$folderName' 생성됨\" }"
